extraction.one_line_summary: BETTIOL Alberto soloed to his first professional victory after attacking on Oude Kwaremont with 14km remaining, holding off ASGREEN's chase.
tactical_patterns: BETTIOL attacked alone on Oude Kwaremont second ascent with 14km to go, winning from distance despite headwind finish.
EF Education First committed VANMARCKE Sebastian to full domestique protection of BETTIOL in final 14km despite being ex-podium finisher.
ASGREEN Casper rode to second without team support, revealing individual capacity exceeds Deceuninck's tactical deployment of him.

rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: positive: Won first career race at monument level after being non-contender, suggesting EF talent identification superior to market
rider_signals.ASGREEN Casper: positive: Finished second without visible team support while Deceuninck focused elsewhere, signaling misallocation of protected rider status
rider_signals.VANMARCKE Sebastian: neutral: World-class classics rider deployed purely as gregario for non-winner teammate, indicating EF saw him as diminished threat
